items.content_html: Firefox 2-119 (2006-2023) compact CSS (-40/30% ↕️/↔️) 1/2/3 lines. Support 90+% of user themes. Option to overlay the address bar with "find in page" bar. Bold font for some context menu entries. Enlarged ⭐ icon, 🟧 instead of "switch to tab", 🔉 instead of "playing". 2x more pinned tabs (same ↔️) Win11+7 "The Most Compact Interface Ever™" +AHK🦊
items.title: hornster02/Firefox-Three-Rows-Simple-Compact-Clean-CSS: Firefox 2-119 (2006-2023) compact CSS (-40/30% ↕️/↔️) 1/2/3 lines. Support 90+% of user themes. Option to overlay the address bar with "find in page" bar. Bold font for some context menu entries. Enlarged ⭐ icon, 🟧 instead of "switch to tab", 🔉 instead of "playing". 2x more pinned tabs (same ↔️) Win11+7 "The Most Compact Interface Ever™" +AHK🦊

items.content_html: 🚀 Welcome to the "TechLife Automation Hub" 🤖 Are you ready to transform your daily routine into a seamless symphony of technology and automation? Look no further!
